arts.ttl: Man United sent Liverpool £50m transfer statement as Diogo Dalot 'interest' emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United will be fully focused on their crucial Europa League clash against Real Sociedad on Thursday as they look to save their season under Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Why Man Utd have made the right decision about Old Trafford
arts.sum: Two things are very apparent from the polished video Manchester United have produced to unveil the club's intention to build a brand-new Old Trafford. Demolishing Old Trafford and building a brand-new home on the same site was one of three options.

arts.ttl: Why Man Utd have made the right decision about Old Trafford
arts.sum: Manchester United have confirmed plans to build a brand-new 100,000-capacity stadium in the place of Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Arsenal, Man Utd eye Raphinha
arts.sum: Raphinha's fine form for Barcelona has Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United all interested. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Man Utd CEO: New stadium poses 'risk' to team
arts.sum: Manchester United CEO Omar Berrada has admitted the club "risk" falling further behind their rivals while they invest in their new stadium.

arts.ttl: Here is an edifice to Sir Jim Ratcliffe's dreams and ambition for Man United, writes CHRIS WHEELER... but some fans will never be happy with the idea of bulldozing Old Trafford to the ground
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: With a club the size of Manchester United, you are never going to please everyone. Not with a global fanbase like theirs.

arts.ttl: Report: Viktor Gyokeres set to snub Ruben Amorim but wants three other PL clubs
arts.sum: Sporting CP’s striker Viktor Gyokeres is reportedly eyeing a move to one of three Premier League clubs this summer, but Manchester United are not on his wishlist. The Swedish forward, who has been in exceptional form since joining Sporting in 2023, has scored an astonishing 82 goals in 90 appearances. His performances have naturally attracted […] The post Report: Viktor Gyokeres set to snub Ruben Amorim but wants three other PL clubs appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Bayern & Real Madrid eye Man Utd's Dalot - Wednesday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United's Diogo Dalot might move in the summer, Viktor Gyokeres continues to attract Premier League interest and Newcastle want Ipswich's Liam Delap.

arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta to Man United transfer truth as Viktor Gyokeres decision pending
arts.sum: Manchester United have been linked with several strikers ahead of this summer; including Jean-Philippe Mateta, Viktor Gyokeres and Victor Osimhen.

arts.ttl: Arsenal to sign Nico Williams as Gyokeres makes Man Utd decision
arts.sum: Arsenal to sign Nico Williams as Gyokeres makes Man Utd decision William Saliba has confirmed his transfer plan amid significant interest from Real Madrid.
